(Discharge) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received suctioning in the last three days of their SNF stay. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
975 SCTNG_SCHLD_ADMSN_CD SCTNG_SCHLD_ADMSN_CD O0110D2A Therapies: Suctioning - Scheduled (Admission) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received scheduled suctioning days one through three (on admission) of becoming a resident of the facility. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
976 SCTNG_SCHLD_DSCHRG_CD
